title: Build a Bookstore Page
description: A bookstore page structured entirely with div elements, classes, and IDs. Two book cards display titles and descriptions with individual Buy Now buttons. A separate cart section at the bottom includes View Cart and Checkout buttons, demonstrating how to use divs to organize and group content into meaningful UI components.
objectives: Use div elements to group and structure page content
Apply classes to style multiple elements consistently
Use IDs to uniquely identify specific elements
Build a card-based layout for displaying items
Add interactive button elements with descriptive text

files.name: index.html
